codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses both prior scanner persistence defects. `installed_path` now stores the scanned skill directory instead of the nested `SKILL.md` path, and the new per-agent plus global reconciliation steps remove stale installation and skill rows when rescans no longer find them. The added regression tests exercise both scenarios and the full validator suite passes.

summary: Pass. The scanner fix resolves the previously reported installed_path and stale-row reconciliation bugs without introducing new review findings.
